summary: Privacy fix verification complete - All real customer and recipe data successfully replaced with dummy data. No real names leak anywhere in the app. Products (132) and costing (55 rows) data remain intact. GST computation verified for both intra-state (CGST+SGST) and inter-state (IGST) transactions.
passed_tests: Backend: B2B customers API returns exactly 2 dummy customers (Demo Foods Pvt Ltd, Sample Traders LLP)
Backend: B2C customers API returns exactly 2 dummy customers (Demo Customer One, Demo Customer Two)
Backend: Products API returns 132 products (unchanged)
Backend: Costing API returns 55 costing rows (unchanged)
Backend: GST computation for Demo Foods Pvt Ltd (Andhra Pradesh) correctly calculates CGST+SGST (intra-state)
Backend: GST computation for Sample Traders LLP (Karnataka) correctly calculates IGST (inter-state)
Backend: No forbidden names (Beruru, Umariyam, Annapurna, Saravana) found in B2B customers
Backend: No forbidden names found in B2C customers
Backend: No forbidden names found in invoices
Backend: No forbidden names found in orders
Backend: Rate card product names match Products master exactly
Frontend: Master Data page loads successfully
Frontend: B2B tab displays exactly 2 customers with correct states and GSTINs
Frontend: B2C tab displays exactly 2 customers
Frontend: Products tab displays 132 products
Frontend: Costing tab displays 55 costing rows
Frontend: No forbidden names found in Master Data page
Frontend: No forbidden names found in Accounts page
Frontend: No forbidden names found in Orders page
Frontend: No forbidden names found in Dashboard
Frontend: No forbidden names found in Inventory page
Frontend: No forbidden names found in Dispatch page
Frontend: Login works correctly with demo user quick-fill buttons
Frontend: Navigation between pages works correctly
Regression: Existing orders (GC-8895 to GC-8903) still display correctly with placeholder names
